## Prompt Text

```text
Repository: D:\Research\UncertaintyProtein-AI4S. Plan-mode only. Do not edit files, do not run mutating commands. Read AGENTS.md and, if present, the default reading set listed there. Then inspect modules around baselines/external adapters/acquisition/protocol configs/tests. Audit current architecture for implementing eight modern protein optimization baselines. Return: current architecture summary, missing pieces for production-ready baseline implementation, recommended integration points, and risks. Cite absolute or repo-relative file paths.
```
